ancient-egypt-lesson-1.transcript: The River Nile provided water, transport, and fertile soil that helped Ancient Egypt thrive.
ancient-egypt-lesson-1.vtt:
WEBVTT

00:00.000 --> 00:05.000
The River Nile provided water and fertile soil.

ancient-egypt-lesson-2.transcript: Farmers in Ancient Egypt relied on the predictable flooding of the Nile to grow crops and feed communities.
ancient-egypt-lesson-2.vtt:
WEBVTT

00:00.000 --> 00:05.000
Farmers in Ancient Egypt relied on the Nile's floods.
